metadata.title: Outplaying a 2v1 on VALORANT’s Mid with Smart Movement and Quick Shots
metadata.description:
Watch how patient peeks and clean aim turn this tough 2v1 in my favor. Timing and positioning made the difference here.
What’s your favorite clutch spot on Mid?
Share your best plays in the comments!

Got a clutch like this? Drop your best moments in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
